description: This chart presents the calculated lattice mismatch values between different composite inclusion pairs in Fe-15Mn-xAl-C low-density steel. The x-axis lists four inclusion pairs: Al₂O₃/MnS, AlN/MnS, TiN/MnS, and Al₂O₃/AlN, while the y-axis represents mismatch degree in percentage. Three effectiveness zones for heterogeneous nucleation are divided: most effective zone (mismatch <6%), moderate effective zone (6% ≤ mismatch ≤12%), and invalid zone (mismatch >12%). The measured mismatch values for the four pairs are 8.41%, 8.94%, 11.65%, and 11.66% respectively, all falling into the moderate effective zone. These results confirm that Al₂O₃, AlN, and TiN can act as heterogeneous nucleation sites for MnS, and Al₂O₃ can also provide nucleation sites for AlN, explaining the formation of observed composite inclusions in the studied steel.
